content:
# Recommendations — after iter-027 (for the iter-028 plan agent)

## TOP PRIORITY (closest to completion)

### η must-close — `pushforward_eta_appIso_collapse` — DO NOT re-dispatch as a plain prove lane
- 13 iters at sorry~3; η has been "nearly closed" for 3 iters and the prover again could not finish.
  The residual is NOT mathematics — it is two stating/coercion obstacles. **EFFORT-BREAK η** (the
  planner already named this as the iter-028 fallback). Two concrete, independent sub-lemmas:
  1. **RingCat `map_one` bridge**: a lemma that `(ConcreteCategory.hom (φ'.app U)) 1 = 1` for the
     RingCat-coercion form (the generic `map_one`/`RingHom.map_one`/`_root_.map_one` won't unify with
     the `DFunLike.coe (fun X Y ↦ RingHom.instFunLike)` instance). Either find the RingCat-flavoured
     `map_one` or expose the bare `RingHom`.
  2. **η-on-unit value via `PresheafOfModules.unit`**: restate
     `restrictScalars_oplaxMonoidal_η_app_one` with the unit element phrased through
     `PresheafOfModules.unit _` (carrier `R.obj W`, a genuine ring) instead of `𝟙_ _`, transporting
     along the `𝟙_ = unit` defeq — this dodges the `OfNat` synthesis failure that blocked *stating*
     the lemma. Proof body already drafted: `Functor.Monoidal.ε_η _` (CONFIRMED typechecks) +
     injectivity of `ε.app W` + `ModuleCat.restrictScalars_η` + `map_one`.
- **Also remove the dead simp step** `simp only [pushforwardPushforwardAdj_unit_app_app_apply]` (L4211)
  — auditor confirmed it is a no-op; the helper does not contribute at that site. Fix the inaccurate
  crediting comments L4208–4214.

## μ-side (genuine geometric residual)
- `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison` (L4276) is the real, non-circular μ content; **orphaned** (not wired
  to `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse`). Dedicated prove lane: mirror proved `pushforwardComp_lax_μ`
  (L2197) one-to-one — `hom_ext` to open U; thread pure-tensor extensionality through
  `pushforward₀OfCommRingCat` sections (`Gβ.obj(A⊗B)` is pushforward-of-tensor, NOT syntactic;
  `tensor_ext` will NOT fire). Multi-hundred LOC. Then wire the 4-step reduction in
  `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse`. **Never re-route μ through `hadj'.IsMonoidal` (circular,
  confirmed iter-026).**

## Blocked / do-NOT-retry
- η via a plain prove lane (3 iters, no close) — effort-break instead, per above.
- μ via mate calculus / `hmon` — circular (iter-026 empirical).

## Coverage debt (1-to-1 tex)
- **NEW unmatched Lean helper**: `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.pushforwardPushforwardAdj_unit_app_app_apply`
  (~L4094). Presheaf-level unit value lemma: `(((pushforwardPushforwardAdj adj φ ψ H₁ H₂).unit.app M).app U).hom x = (M.map (adj.counit.app U.unop).op).hom x`; proof `rfl` (deps: `pushforwardId`/`pushforwardComp = Iso.refl`,
  `pushforwardNatTrans`, `pushforwardCongr`). Planner: add a `\label`+`\lean`+`\uses` block. NOTE it is
  currently `private` and a no-op at its only use site — decide whether to keep it before blueprinting.
- 105 total `unmatched` lean_aux nodes persist (long-standing coverage debt; unchanged this iter). The
  bulk are pre-existing helpers; this is a standing planner backlog, not new.

## Housekeeping (auditor majors/minors)
- Stale header L46–50: claims "SOLE in-file sorry is `hmon : hadj'.IsMonoidal` (~L4223)". Reality: 3
  sorries (L4235/4276/4381), `hmon` proxy-sorry'd via the two top-level collapse lemmas, line ref
  ~300 off. Refresh.
- All four collapse targets are `private` yet pinned by blueprint `\lean{}` (works via sync, fragile).
- Other stale resident/status comments flagged by auditor — bundle into a cleanup pass when convenient.

## Strategy note
- progress-critic flagged TensorObjSubstrate STUCK / TensorObjInverse CHURNING entering iter-027. iter-027
  did not change that (0 close). The η effort-break is the must-do corrective; if η still does not close
  iter-028 after a fine break, this is a genuine structural-stall signal — consider mathlib-analogist on
  the RingCat-coercion `map_one` / `𝟙_=unit` plumbing seam.
